statement.en: Virtual Knapping (and Refitting) with Neural Networks: Proofs of Concept

proposer: F. Jordy Orellana, Jonathan Scott Reeves, Shannon P. Mcpherron et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The paper presents proof-of-concept applications of neural networks to virtual stone tool knapping and refitting—a novel methodological combination in archaeology/CS intersection. Claims are exploratory and technique-demonstrative rather than establishing settled fact. The work appears not yet peer-reviewed (preprint status, future date contextually indicates speculative evaluation). Virtual knapping itself is implementable (TRUE in CLASS-A), but generalization claims and archaeological validity remain under validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 割られた石片の軌跡は連続の微積分と離散の和によって同じ本質を歌う。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 破片が母石へ引き寄せられ、神経細胞がそのミクロな記憶を再構築する。
